title: I Love Chipotle, but I'm Not Buying It at These Prices
text: The fast-casual restaurant chain is priced for perfection in an environment that is anything but.

title: Chipotle Earnings Preview: Rising Costs and Employee Shortages to Hamper Growth in Q4
text: The fast-casual restaurant chain is scheduled to report fourth-quarter results on Feb. 8.

title: 3 Resilient Stocks to Help Solidify Your Portfolio
text: It helps to load up your investment portfolio with resilient stocks that can successfully weather crises.

title: Toast Stock Price Predictions: The TOST Downgrade Turning Investors' Stomachs Today
text: TOST stock is falling hard after an analyst downgrade. Here's what investors should know about this stock's price predictions.

title: Is Chipotle's Stock Better Than This Peer?
text: We think that Chipotle Mexican Grill's stock, currently is a similar pick compared to Texas Roadhouse's stock. Chipotle's stock trades at about 5.8x trailing revenues, compared to around 1.8x for Texas Roadhouse.

title: Chipotle (CMG) Banks on Digitization Efforts Amid High Costs
text: Chipotle's (CMG) consistent strength in digital sales and positive customer reception to new menu items bode well. However, inflationary pressures are a concern.

title: Starbucks, Chipotle among companies reducing operational hours due to staffing shortages
text: Companies across the country are announcing plans to cut hours of operation due to staffing shortages as the country deals with a record surge of coronavirus cases, vaccine mandates, and supply chain issues.

title: Some Starbucks, Chipotle sites cut hours, limit seating over omicron
text: Chains such as Starbucks Corp. and Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. said they are temporarily limiting operations at individual stores or regions as they face labor shortages and a rise in Covid-19 cases.

title: The Ratings Game: The bear-market selloff in Chipotle's stock has created an ‘attractive' buying opportunity, analyst says
text: The bear-market selloff in the shares of Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. has created an “attractive entry point” for investors, and tempted Morgan Stanley analyst John Glass to make a “risk on” call on the fast-casual restaurant chain.

title: Can Chipotle (CMG) Keep the Earnings Surprise Streak Alive?
text: Chipotle (CMG) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: The Ratings Game: Chipotle is hot and Starbucks hits pause: Analysts say cost inflation will weigh on restaurants in 2022
text: The new year is just getting started but analysts have already upgraded Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. and downgraded Starbucks Corp., with experts concerned that cost inflation will take a toll on the entire restaurant category.

title: Chipotle is ignoring Beyond and Impossible's fake meat in favor of creating its own, and experts say it's a brilliant move
text: Chipotle's new fake meat chorizo is expanding to menus across the country for a limited time after a successful test last year.

title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Posts Banner Year in 2021
text: 2021 proved to be another bang-up year for Bill Ackman (Trades, Portfolio)'s Pershing Square Capital despite its ongoing issues with its special purpose acquisition company, the pandemic and a number of economic headwinds.

title: Chipotle launches its own plant-based chorizo for a limited time
text: Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. said Monday that it has launched a limited-time plant-based chorizo option in the U.S.

title: Chipotle Launches Plant-Based Chorizo At US Locations
text: Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc (NYSE: CMG) said its Plant-Based Chorizo is available for a limited time at U.S. locations. Plant-Based Chorizo is certified vegan, packed with 16 grams of protein per 4oz serving, and is made without artificial flavors, colors, preservatives, grains, gluten, or soy.

title: Chipotle launches limited-time plant-based chorizo
text: Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. CMG, +0.06% said Monday that it has launched a limited-time plant-based chorizo option in the U.S. Its plant-based chorizo is made with chipotle peppers, tomato paste, garlic and fresh peas. The item is vegan and has 16 grams of protein.

title: Chipotle's Plant-Based Chorizo Now Available Nationwide
text: Chipotle began testing its plant-based chorizo in August in two markets. The offering is now available across the U.S.

title: Chipotle adds meatless chorizo to its menu for limited time
text: Chipotle is launching plant-based chorizo nationwide, starting Monday, and available for a limited time.

title: CHIPOTLE LAUNCHES PLANT-BASED CHORIZO AND NEW LIFESTYLE BOWLS
text: NEWPORT BEACH, Calif., Jan. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) today announced Plant-Based Chorizo is available for a limited time at U.S. locations.
